PRIMARY_INTERVENTION_VARIABLE: Test whether parseability can improve without inducing schema-spill regression via localized shaping on rg_search/read_file only.
NON_OBJECTIVES: Do not apply global prompt-template rewrites
Do not apply global negation-heavy schema pressure
Do not alter canonical eval semantics or thresholds
SUCCESS_CRITERIA_INTERPRETATION: heldout invalid_json/payload_not_parsed decreases vs i3 baseline without payload_not_object+missing_tool_calls spill regression
ABORT_CONDITIONS: Any prompt/target/source_case overlap with heldout or tool_holdout
Any approval gate toggled open before required reviews
